overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a science fiction flight simulation game, piloting a spacecraft through dense fog over mountainous terrain at dawn. The clip features a high-tech holographic HUD and transitions from a side-window view with visible pilot hand to a centered forward view.

events.description: camera shifts from side window view to centered forward view, pilot hand moves off controls

agents.ego_description: hand gripping flight control stick while observing foggy terrain through side window

entered.detail: metal frame of cockpit side window with visible rivets
futuristic control yoke being gripped by pilot hand
obscured rocky landscape barely visible through dense fog
faint orange lights from distant buildings or structures

segments.scene_description: Inside a spacecraft cockpit, the pilot's hand grips the control stick while looking out the side window at foggy mountains. The view is constrained to the side window frame with distant lights visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: spacecraft cockpit forward view through fog

agents.ego_description: piloting spacecraft forward through dense fog, monitoring flight instruments on holographic display

entered.detail: wide panoramic cockpit window frame with metallic edges
sun or moon diffused into bright glow through thick fog

segments.scene_description: The view shifts to the front windshield, showing an endless expanse of fog with a bright celestial body diffused in the center. The spacecraft continues flying forward through the dense atmospheric haze with no visible ground reference.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement within a high-tech cockpit that shifts from a constrained side view of a rugged landscape to an expansive, ethereal void. It begins with a close-up of the pilot's hand gripping the control stick, looking through a side window at distant lights flickering amidst foggy mountains. As the camera glides toward the center of the craft, the perspective opens up to the wide front windshield, leaving the mountain terrain behind. The scene then expands into an endless expanse of dense atmospheric haze, where the surrounding environment dissolves into a featureless white. Finally, the view settles on a bright, diffused celestial body glowing through the center of the fog as the spacecraft pushes forward into the light.
